twitter_thread: Only 15% of fitness gear marketing campaigns focus on accessories, despite driving 60% of revenue at brands like Nike and Under Armour.
Instagram Reels with influencer partnerships see 50% higher engagement for fitness gear brands, with 30% of videos featuring workouts with specific products.
Allocating 40% of marketing budget to Facebook ads targeting 25-44 year olds can increase sales by 20% for fitness gear brands.
Using generic stock photos can cut sales by 10%: 80% of consumers say they're more likely to buy from brands showcasing real people using their gear.
Hootsuite and Buffer can save fitness gear brands 5 hours/week on social media management, allowing for more content creation and engagement.
60% of top fitness gear brands offer free shipping on orders over $50, seeing a 25% increase in sales as a result.
What's the most effective social media tactic you've seen a fitness gear brand use to drive sales? #fitnessgear #marketing
